category_sources: source_facts.description says Locust is a scalable user load testing tool written in Python.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Locust site and uses the Locust project name.
docs_sources: Official Locust documentation is hosted on the dedicated docs.locust.io domain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official Locust site and documentation identify locustio/locust as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies load testing and Python; official docs describe writing and running Locust tests.
